waiting_for: Pullback to EMA21 (29994.86) for high R/R long entry, or break above 30052.75 for momentum continuation

long_assessment.reasoning: Strong uptrend confirmed by EMA alignment (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Price has rallied 37 points from prior bar and sits 14.9 points above EMA21. A pullback to EMA21 at 29994.86 offers a high-probability long with 100+ point target to 30100 psychological level (30095 after 5pt buffer). Risk 40 points (stop at 29954.86, 10pts below EMA150) yields 2.5:1 R/R. Stochastic at 61.4 shows room to run before overbought. Setup is 'waiting' because price has not yet reached the entry level; resting LIMIT order at EMA21 will trigger on pullback.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. The nearest bullish FVG below (29950.25-29966.75) is now 54.5 points away — too distant for a fill trade with acceptable R/R (would need ~40pt stop for only ~11pt target). EMA structure is strongly bullish, stochastic is not overbought, and price is above the 30000 psychological level. Counter-trend shorts into a strong uptrend lack confluence and violate trend-following discipline.
